prediction.reasoning: For a 2-day prediction of SYK (Stryker), I used historical volatility analysis showing typical daily moves of 1-2% for large-cap healthcare stocks. The point estimate reflects minimal drift with slight upward bias due to sector stability. Confidence intervals are based on assumed daily volatility of ~1.5%, scaled to 2 days (σ ≈ 2.12%), using normal distribution assumptions with appropriate z-scores (0.67, 1.28, 1.645 for 50%, 80%, 90% respectively).
